name: payments-platform
description: PCI-DSS compliance and payment security capabilities. Bundles payment risk review skill, PCI-DSS coding rules, and security reviewer agent. Required on any repo handling payment data.
author: Nexus Platform Payments Team
usageExamples: Use the security-reviewer agent before merging any payment-service change
/payments-risk-review to run a full PCI-DSS compliance check
complianceNote: Installing this plugin does not guarantee PCI-DSS compliance. It provides automated checks and guidance. Human security review is still required for audit certification.
